'''旧暦3月15日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * （[[280年]]_月_日） - [[呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[元慶]]2年（[[878年]]_月_日） - [[元慶の乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]_月_日） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の花見 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * （[[405年]]_月_日） - [[履中天皇]]、17代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月14日 (旧暦)|3月14日]] 翌日[[3月16日 (旧暦)|3月16日]] - 前月[[2月15日 (旧暦)|2月15日]] 翌月[[4月15日 (旧暦)|4月15日]] *新暦[[3月15日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[280年]][[5月1日]]） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[元慶]]2年（ユリウス暦[[878年]][[4月21日]]） - [[元慶の乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[慶長]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1598年]][[4月20日]]） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の[[花見]] * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月7日]]） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== 誕生日 == * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[4月9日]]） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第3代当主（+ [[1699年]]） * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月3日]]） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]]、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[4月24日]]） - [[梁川紅蘭]]、女流[[漢詩人]]（+ [[1879年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[履中天皇]]6年（ユリウス暦[[405年]][[4月29日]]） - [[履中天皇]]、17代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

revision.text:
'''March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 15'''<!--Lunar March15--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[280年]][[5月1日]]） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[元慶]]2年（ユリウス暦[[878年]][[4月21日]]） - [[元慶の乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[慶長]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1598年]][[4月20日]]） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の[[花見]] * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月7日]]） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== 誕生日 == * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[4月9日]]） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第3代当主（+ [[1699年]]） * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月3日]]） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]]、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[4月24日]]） - [[梁川紅蘭]]、女流[[漢詩人]]（+ [[1879年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[履中天皇]]6年（ユリウス暦[[405年]][[4月29日]]） - [[履中天皇]]、17代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ_Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!----->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:deprecated qqs front]]<!--3月15日 (旧暦)-->[[Category:deprecated qqs back]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:ppp]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Lunar March]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]] {{citation needed}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 15'''<!--Lunar March15 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]である。
--> == Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[280年]][[5月1日]]） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[元慶]]2年（ユリウス暦[[878年]][[4月21日]]） - [[元慶の乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[慶長]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1598年]][[4月20日]]） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の[[花見]] * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月7日]]） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== Births == * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[4月9日]]） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第3代当主（+ [[1699年]]） * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月3日]]） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]]、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[4月24日]]） - [[梁川紅蘭]]、女流[[漢詩人]]（+ [[1879年]]）

removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it

revision.comment: translating this common phrase in them
revision.text:
[[sn:March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] [[zh:三月十五]] [[en:draft:March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[280]][[5月1日]]） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[元慶]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[878]][[4月21日]]） - [[元慶の乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[慶長]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1598]][[4月20日]]） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の[[花見]] * [[明治]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[4月7日]]） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== Births == * [[明暦]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1656]][[4月9日]]） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第3代当主（+ [[1699]]） * [[寛文]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1662]][[5月3日]]） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]]、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1年 ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1804]][[4月24日]]） - [[梁川紅蘭]]、女流[[漢詩人]]（+ [[1879]]）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]]6th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[405]][[4月29日]]） - [[履中天皇]]、17代[[天皇]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[280]][[5月1日]]） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[878]][[4月21日]]） - [[Gangyōの乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1598]][[4月20日]]） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[4月7日]]） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== Births == * [[明暦]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1656]][[4月9日]]） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第3代当主（+ [[1699]]） * [[寛文]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1662]][[5月3日]]） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]]、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1年 ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1804]][[4月24日]]） - [[梁川紅蘭]]、女流[[漢詩人]]（+ [[1879]]）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]]6th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[405]][[4月29日]]） - [[履中天皇]]、17代[[天皇]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

[[sn:March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] [[zh:三月十五]] [[en:draft:March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[280]] [[5月1日]] ） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]] の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]] に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[878]] [[4月21日]] ） - [[Gangyōの乱]] 。[[出羽国|出羽]] で[[蝦夷]] が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1598]] [[4月20日]] ） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]] が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]] らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[4月7日]] ） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]] の高札を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[5月3日]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[4月24日]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[4月29日]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[天皇]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[March 15 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] [[zh:三月十五]] [[en:draft:March 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[280]] [[May 1]] ） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]] の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]] に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[878]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Gangyōの乱]] 。[[出羽国|出羽]] で[[蝦夷]] が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1598]] [[April 20]] ） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]] が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]] らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 7]] ） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]] の高札を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[April 9]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 3]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[April 24]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[April 29]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[天皇]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[280]] [[May 1]] ） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]] の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]] に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[878]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Gangyōの乱]] 。[[出羽国|出羽]] で[[蝦夷]] が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1598]] [[April 20]] ） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]] が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]] らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 7]] ） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]] の高札を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[April 9]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 3]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[April 24]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[April 29]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[天皇]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:March 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] [[zh:三月十五]] [[en:draft:March 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[280]] [[May 1]] ） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]] の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]] に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[878]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Gangyōの乱]] 。[[出羽国|出羽]] で[[蝦夷]] が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1598]] [[April 20]] ） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]] が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]] らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 7]] ） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]] の高札を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[April 9]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 3]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[April 24]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[April 29]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[天皇]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

[[sn:March 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] [[zh:三月十五]] [[en:draft:March 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[280]] [[May 1]] ） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]] の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]] に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[878]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Gangyōの乱]] 。[[出羽国|出羽]] で[[Ezo]] が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1598]] [[April 20]] ） - 醍醐の花見。[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] が[[Toyotomi Hideyori|秀頼]] らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 7]] ） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]] の高札を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[April 9]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 3]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1年 ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[April 24]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[April 29]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[Emperor of Japan]]
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] [[zh:三月十五]] [[en:draft:March 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[280]] [[May 1]] ） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]] の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]] に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[878]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Gangyōの乱]] 。[[出羽国|出羽]] で[[Ezo]] が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1598]] [[April 20]] ） - 醍醐の花見。[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] が[[Toyotomi Hideyori|秀頼]] らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 7]] ） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]] の高札を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[April 9]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 3]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[April 24]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[April 29]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[Emperor of Japan]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[280]] [[May 1]] ） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]] の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]] に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[878]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Gangyōの乱]] 。[[出羽国|出羽]] で[[Ezo]] が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[Keichō]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1598]] [[April 20]] ） - 醍醐の花見。[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] が[[Toyotomi Hideyori|秀頼]] らと最後の[[花見]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 7]] ） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]] の高札を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[April 9]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 3]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[April 24]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[April 29]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[Emperor of Japan]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十五]]

== Births == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1656]] [[April 9]] ） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]] 、[[有栖川宮]] 第3代当主（+ [[1699]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1662]] [[May 3]] ） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]] 、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[April 24]] ） - [[梁川紅蘭]] 、女流[[漢詩人]] （+ [[1879]] ）
== Deaths == * [[履中天皇]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[405]] [[April 29]] ） - [[履中天皇]] 、17代[[Emperor of Japan]]
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日}}) – The Meiji government established high-ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.

== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[280]] {{ill|May 1|ja|5月1日|12=draft}}) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[Gangyō]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[878]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft}}) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[Keichō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1598]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月15日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[280年]][[5月1日]]） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[元慶]]2年（ユリウス暦[[878年]][[4月21日]]） - [[元慶の乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[慶長]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1598年]][[4月20日]]） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の[[花見]] * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月7日]]） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== 誕生日 == * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[4月9日]]） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第3代当主（+ [[1699年]]） * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月3日]]） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]]、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[4月24日]]） - [[梁川紅蘭]]、女流[[漢詩人]]（+ [[1879年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[履中天皇]]6年（ユリウス暦[[405年]][[4月29日]]） - [[履中天皇]]、17代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315}}

== できごと == * [[太康 (晋)|太康]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[280年]][[5月1日]]） - [[呉 (三国)|呉]]の孫晧が[[西晋|晋]]に降伏し、晋が全国統一 * [[元慶]]2年（ユリウス暦[[878年]][[4月21日]]） - [[元慶の乱]]。[[出羽国|出羽]]で[[蝦夷]]が叛乱を起こし秋田城を急襲 * [[慶長]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1598年]][[4月20日]]） - 醍醐の花見。[[豊臣秀吉]]が[[豊臣秀頼|秀頼]]らと最後の[[花見]] * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月7日]]） - 明治政府が[[五榜の掲示]]の高札を設置
== 誕生日 == * [[明暦]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1656年]][[4月9日]]） - [[有栖川宮幸仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第3代当主（+ [[1699年]]） * [[寛文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1662年]][[5月3日]]） - [[田中休愚|田中丘隅]]、農政家・経世家（+ [[1730年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[4月24日]]） - [[梁川紅蘭]]、女流[[漢詩人]]（+ [[1879年]]）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 15|qq=March 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|qq=}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|qq=}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:405|405]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Ritsuchū]], the 17th Emperor of Japan.
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|qq=|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|qq=|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:405|405]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Ritsuchū]], the 17th Emperor of Japan.

== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|qq=|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|qq=|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:405|405]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Ritsuchū]], the 17th Emperor of Japan.

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:405|405]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Ritsuchū]], the 17th Emperor of Japan.
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:405|405]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Ritsuchū]], the 17th Emperor of Japan.
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:405|405]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Ritsuchū]], the 17th Emperor of Japan.
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|14|3|16|2|15|4|3|0315|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:280|280]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1598|1598]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nanbu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died [[:en:1664|1664]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1735|1735]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died [[:en:1808|1808]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:405|405]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Ritsuchū]], the 17th Emperor of Japan.

{{Not to be confused with|March 15|qq=March 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|280|en|280|WD=Q32237|lt=280}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|WD=Q2544|lt=May 1}}) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * {{ill|Gangyō|en|Gangyō|WD=Q747451|lt=Gangyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|878|en|878|WD=Q23910|lt=878}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1598|en|1598|WD=Q6800|lt=1598}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7}}) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1606|en|1606|WD=Q6747|lt=1606}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – {{ill|Nanbu Shigenao|en|Nanbu Shigenao|WD=Q6962458|lt=Nanbu Shigenao}}, the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died {{ill|1664|en|1664|WD=Q7581|lt=1664}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 20th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1735|en|1735|WD=Q6984|lt=1735}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1}}) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died {{ill|1808|en|1808|WD=Q6914|lt=1808}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Richū|en|Emperor Richū|WD=Q329704|lt=Emperor Richū}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|405|en|405|WD=Q32745|lt=405}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – {{ill|Emperor Richū|en|Emperor Richū|WD=Q329704|lt=Emperor Ritsuchū}}, the 17th Emperor of Japan.

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taikang|ja|太康_(晋)|zh|太康_(西晋)|ko|태강_(서진)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikang|1=Taikang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8011632}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|280|en|280|WD=Q32237|lt=280|1=280}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|WD=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}}) – In this year, the grandson Hao of Wu surrendered to the Jin, leading to the unification of China under Jin. * {{ill|Gangyō|en|Gangyō|WD=Q747451|lt=Gangyō|1=Gangyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|878|en|878|WD=Q23910|lt=878|1=878}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – The Gangyō Rebellion occurred in Dewa, when a revolt by the Ezo erupted and attacked Akita Castle. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1598|en|1598|WD=Q6800|lt=1598|1=1598}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20|1=April 20}}) – A famed flower-viewing event was held at Daigo. Toyotomi Hideyoshi and Hideyori had their final hanami. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}}) – The Meiji government established high-Ranking signboards known as the "Gobō no Keiji" at the outset of its reforms.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1606|en|1606|WD=Q6747|lt=1606|1=1606}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – {{ill|Nanbu Shigenao|en|Nanbu Shigenao|WD=Q6962458|lt=Nanbu Shigenao|1=Nanbu Shigenao}}, the 2nd lord of the Morioka Domain (died {{ill|1664|en|1664|WD=Q7581|lt=1664|1=1664}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 20th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1735|en|1735|WD=Q6984|lt=1735|1=1735}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1|1=April 1}}) – {{ill|Katō Chien|ja|加藤千蔭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Chien|1=Katō Chikage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1293828}}, a Kokugaku scholar and waka poet (died {{ill|1808|en|1808|WD=Q6914|lt=1808|1=1808}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Richū|en|Emperor Richū|WD=Q329704|lt=Emperor Richū|1=Emperor Richū}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|405|en|405|WD=Q32745|lt=405|1=405}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29|1=April 29}}) – {{ill|Emperor Richū|en|Emperor Richū|WD=Q329704|lt=Emperor Ritsuchū|1=Emperor Richū}}, the 17th Emperor of Japan.
